---
name: 🐞 Bug Report
about: Report a broken interaction, malfunctioning tensor, or system behavior
title: '[BUG] Short summary of the issue'
labels: ['bug', 'triage']
assignees: []
---

## ❗ Problem Description
Describe what went wrong in one sentence.

## 🧬 Affected Subsystem(s)
- [ ] Core Engine
- [ ] Force Modules
- [ ] Simulation
- [ ] API Backend
- [ ] Web Frontend
- [ ] Visualization
- [ ] Mathematics
- [ ] Docker/Kubernetes
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI/CD Pipeline

## 🧪 Reproduction Steps
Provide a minimal reproducible input.

## 🖥️ Environment
| Field         | Value              |
|---------------|--------------------|
| OS            | e.g., Ubuntu 22.04 |
| Python ver.   | e.g., 3.11.6       |
| Browser (web) | e.g., Chrome 121   |
| GPU           | e.g., A100 80GB    |

## 📎 Logs / Screenshots

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria
When is this considered fixed?
